kopp.eu https://www.zoominfo.com/c/heinrich-kopp-gmbh/372789517 Heinrich Kopp GmbH, headquartered in Kahl am Main, Germany, has been developing and manufacturing electrical installation products "Made in Germany" since 1927. The company offers a catalog of over 7,000 products — from simple plugs and switches to Smart Home and wireless radio systems. Kopp is one of the leading electrical installation brands in German-speaking countries, serving both professional electricians and DIY customers. In 2020, the company launched a new "Energy & Home Automation" division, expanding into the smart home market

nostrum.co.jp Nostrum Corporation, based in Japan, was founded in 1991 and specializes in smartphone app development, web system development, and website construction. The company is represented by Ryoichi Jono and is registered on the J-GoodTech platform as a verified Japanese technology business. One of their flagship self-developed products is a job aptitude test preparation tool — a simulation platform replicating real SPI, TG-WEB, and similar employment exam interfaces used by major Japanese companies

mims.com zoominfo.com/c/mims-pte-ltd/354424916 MIMS is a pharmaceutical prescribing reference guide first published in the United Kingdom in 1959 by Haymarket Media Group. The platform provides comprehensive drug information — including dosages, interactions, clinical guidelines, and prescribing data — for healthcare professionals across the globe. MIMS operates internationally across Asia, Australia, and beyond, with dedicated editions for countries including Malaysia, India, Indonesia, Japan, Singapore, and many others. Its mobile app and online database are used daily by doctors and pharmacists for drug lookups, medical news, and CME articles

itmanagement.co.th zoominfo.com/c/it-management-co-ltd/446178193 IT Management Co., Ltd. is a small local IT company based in Bangkok, Thailand, located at 562 Dindaeng Road, Din Daeng district. The company specializes in network intelligence and IT infrastructure solutions, assembling teams capable of handling a full range of networking functions. It appears to be a boutique-sized local business with a modest online presence

notredamecampinas.com.br zoominfo.com/c/colégio-notre-dame-campinas/460150468 Colégio Notre Dame is a private Catholic school founded in 1961 in Campinas, São Paulo, Brazil, by the Congregation of Holy Cross. The school offers education from kindergarten through secondary school (Ensino Infantil to Ensino Médio), as well as international curriculum programs. With over 12,000 Instagram followers and 51–200 employees, it is one of the most recognized private schools in the Campinas region. Its motto — "educating minds and hearts" — reflects its mission to combine academic excellence with Catholic values

beaconhouse.net zoominfo.com/c/beaconhouse-school-system/351460008 Beaconhouse was founded in November 1975 in Lahore, Pakistan, as the modest Les Anges Montessori Academy with just 19 toddlers. Today it has grown into a global network with over 380,000 students across 8 countries, including Pakistan, the UK, Malaysia, the Philippines, UAE, Oman, Belgium, and Thailand. The group employs more than 18,000 staff from around the world and encompasses everything from early childhood education to university-level institutions such as Beaconhouse National University and Concordia Colleges. In 1996, it became the first private school network in the world to receive financing from the World Bank's International Finance Corporation

acfa.ab.ca zoominfo.com/c/acfa-régionale-de-calgary/354494275 The ACFA (French Canadian Association of Alberta) was founded in 1926 and serves as the official political spokesperson for all French-speaking people in Alberta. Its core mission is to protect francophone linguistic rights, advance French-language education, and strengthen the cultural vitality of Alberta's Francophone communities across 13+ regional branches. The non-profit is headquartered in Edmonton and employs between 11–50 people. It is currently approaching its 100th anniversary, with the board actively planning centennial celebrations

The Rural Municipality of Gimli is a local government district in the province of Manitoba, Canada. Situated on the western shore of Lake Winnipeg, it administers a region known for its Icelandic heritage, recreational tourism, and lakefront economy. Gimli serves as both a residential community and a cultural hub for the Interlake area.
